pt.botd.simulationCtaDesc: See exactly what the daily Pick of the Day stream would have returned at your own stake, using the actual pre-match odds stored for each pick. Opens the full calculator scoped to Bet of the Day only.
pt.botd.simulationCtaTitle: Simulate your Bet of the Day returns
pt.results.noBacktestHint: Our live results feed only keeps the last 30 days, and the backtest regime ended on 16 April 2026. Switch to Live to see picks logged since launch.
pt.results.noBacktestTitle: No backtest picks in this window
pt.results.roiCalcAvgOddsTooltip: Average bookmaker odds paid across the picks in this window. Lower odds (e.g. 1.30) mean the pick was a heavy favourite — you win less per correct bet, so you need a higher win rate to come out ahead.
pt.results.roiCalcBreakEvenTooltip: The win rate you need to hit — given the average odds — just to not lose money. If your actual win rate is below this number, the simulator will be in the red even if accuracy looks healthy.
pt.results.roiCalcDisclaimer: Return calculated with the actual pre-match 1X2 odds stored for each fixture. Flat stake, one unit per pick, no compounding. Educational simulation — not financial or betting advice.
pt.results.roiCalcEstimatedNote: Note: {count} of {total} picks had no odds on file and use a flat 1.90 fallback.
pt.results.roiCalcIntro: Follow the four steps to see what our live picks would have returned at your own stake. Simulation runs against strict pre-match odds from 16 April 2026 onwards.
pt.results.roiCalcModelNote: Note: {count} of {total} picks had no bookmaker odds on file — fair odds were derived from the model probability (1 / prob).
pt.results.roiCalcSmallSampleHint: Only {n} graded picks so far. Early streaks are noisy — even with a strong long-term model, a short run of losses can easily drop you below break-even. Wait for at least 30 picks before drawing conclusions about the model.
pt.results.roiCalcSrcAllHint: Everything combined — good for volume, mixes two different data regimes.
pt.results.roiCalcSrcBacktestHint: Model validation on historical data — no wagering against closing odds.
pt.results.roiCalcSrcLiveHint: Strict pre-match picks logged since 16 April 2026. Matches the live track record.
pt.results.roiCalcStep1Hint: Which tier of picks do you want to include?
pt.results.roiCalcStep1LockedHint: Bet of the Day is always Gold tier — scope is locked.
pt.results.roiCalcStep2Hint: How much would you have wagered on each pick?
pt.results.roiCalcStep3Hint: How far back should we look? Pick a preset or type any number of days.
pt.results.roiCalcStep4Hint: What you would have won or lost with these settings.
pt.results.roiCalcStepSourceHint: Live = strict pre-match picks since 16 Apr 2026 (matches the track record). Backtest = historical model validation. All = both combined.
pt.tier.badge: Three tiers, one honest track record
pt.tier.lede: Every prediction is labelled with a tier based on model confidence. The higher the tier, the stricter the threshold and the sharper the numbers.
pt.tier.liveNote: Live numbers, straight from our database.
pt.trackRecord.signInLockedLede: Free Access gets you into the dashboard — no card, no billing. Inside you unlock the full live track record, CSV / JSON export on every prediction, and per-match detail on every call we've ever made.
pt.trackRecord.signInLockedTitle: Want CSV exports and every detail per pick?
